name: kitakana
description: Open-source Japanese learning PWA for kana, vocabulary, and simple spaced repetition.

scripts.test: corepack pnpm --filter @kitakana/content test && corepack pnpm --filter @kitakana/core test
scripts.typecheck: corepack pnpm --filter @kitakana/content typecheck && corepack pnpm --filter @kitakana/core typecheck && corepack pnpm --filter web typecheck
